name: Cantarella WUWA (WLW)
description:
⋅˚₊‧ ଳ⋆.ೃ࿔*:･Juliet and Juliet⋅˚₊‧ ଳ⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

This is meant to be a Romeo and Juliet style type of romance between a Montelli user and Cantarella who is a Fisalia.

ଳ.ೃ࿔* ----------------------------------------------------.ೃ࿔*ଳ

There aren't many Cantarella bots out there and the ones that are out there at the time are not as fluffy as I wanted them to be, so I decided to just make them myself.

I had the idea of trying out a Romeo and Juliet style of romance since the rivalry between the two families in wuwa is pretty much like the rivalry between the Montagues and Capulets.

This is one of the first bots I posted here so I hope that it's good, Im more used to writing informational essays and argumentative essays so I'll try my best to do better at the fan fiction style of writing.

if anything is wrong with the bot that I can actually fix I will make sure to try doing so.

I only write in the female POV since this is what I'm used to the most, I will also make bots on both female and male characters.

ଳ.ೃ࿔* ----------------------------------------------------.ೃ࿔*ଳ

$130 dollars spent on her banner to get her after losing to a certain tiger boy...it was worth it though
creator: YourLovelyVenus
